name: Floyd Nathans
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing middle-class clothing. Wields a longsword or claymore of high quality, potentially enchanted. Carries a bottle of ale, beer, or cheap wine.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: bard, quiet, peaceful, neighborly, simple, village dweller
Role: Floyd Nathans is a bard living in the quiet village of Blankenmarch. He lives a simple, peaceful existence among his neighbors, socializing with Hanz gro-Hubrag and Philip Franc. Despite being a bard, he lives a very quiet life. He carries alcohol and gold, and knows illusion spells including Chameleon, Invisibility, or Silence.
Home Location Information: His own house in the village of Blankenmarch.
Daily Routine: Floyd wakes at 6am, exits his house, and spends the entire day walking around outside the village, occasionally talking with his neighbors Hanz gro-Hubrag and Philip Franc. At 8pm he returns home and sits at the table for a two-hour meal before going to bed at 10pm.
Personality - The Village Bard: Floyd lives a remarkably quiet life for a bard, choosing the peaceful existence of rural village life over the typical wandering minstrel lifestyle. He's sociable with his neighbors and content with the simple routines of Blankenmarch.
author: Bethesda
